title: Weekend Recap: Premier League Title Race Heats Up, Serie A Upset, and FPL Price Chaos
description: Full weekend coverage across all major leagues. The Premier League title race takes another twist as Arsenal stumble, Serie A delivers a stunning upset, and FPL managers scramble before Tuesday's price changes. Plus: Champions League round of 16 preview, MLS opening weekend reactions, and a Liga MX derby delivers drama.

chapters.title: Top Story: Arsenal's Title Hopes Take a Hit
La Liga: Barcelona Extend Their Lead
Serie A Upset: Atalanta Stun Juventus
MLS Opening Weekend & Liga MX Derby
Around the World: Eredivisie, Primeira Liga & Copa Libertadores
FPL Corner: Price Changes, Differentials & Gameweek Preview

show_notes_html:
Weekend Recap — March 1, 2026

Top Story

Arsenal's title challenge takes a blow with a 1-1 draw at home to Bournemouth. Saka limped off at 67 minutes — FPL managers, act now before the price drop.

Premier League

Manchester City close the gap to 2 points. Liverpool cruise past Wolves 3-0. Watkins scores for Villa but from a 0.04 xG chance.

FPL Corner

Price rises tonight: Palmer (£8.2m, +0.1), Rogers (£4.8m, +0.1). Price falls: Saka (flagged, ownership dropping). Differential pick: Rogers — 3.2% owned, 3 chances created from set pieces.
